_comment_column_definition: Column definition uses Claude Haiku (fast, cheap). Uses sonar-pro only when context_web_research items provided.
_comment_row_discovery: Row discovery with 2-level escalation (premium models). Starts with sonar-pro (high context) for quality, escalates to Claude Sonnet 4.5 with web searches if insufficient. Global counter checks total across all subdomains before escalating. Uses soft_schema for flexible JSON parsing.

escalation_strategy.description: Premium search with sonar-pro for high quality results
Fallback to Claude Sonnet with web search for comprehensive coverage

_comment_qc_review: QC layer reviews discovered rows and decides which to keep, reject, or reprioritize. Uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 without web search. min_row_count: minimum rows after QC (promotes rejected if needed). min_row_count_for_frontend: threshold below which frontend shows restart button. qc_strategy: which QC method to use (traditional=LLM-based, validator=validator-lambda-based, both=run both and merge). For validator QC, validator_qc_model and validator_qc_context configure the validator lambda search. allow_retrigger: enables QC to request rerun with new subdomains. max_retriggers: prevents infinite loops (typically 1).

qc_review._comment_qc_strategy: QC strategy: 'traditional' = LLM-based QC review, 'validator' = validator lambda with 2x1 hard/soft weighting, 'both' = run both and merge (intersection=approve, union=demote)
qc_review._comment_validator_qc: Settings for validator lambda QC (used when qc_strategy='validator' or 'both'). validator_qc_model: which search model to use ('sonar' or 'sonar-pro'). validator_qc_context: search context size ('low', 'medium', or 'high')
qc_review._comment_retrigger: Retrigger allows QC to request additional discovery round with completely new subdomains. allow_retrigger: enable/disable feature. max_retriggers: maximum number of retrigger cycles (typically 1 to prevent loops)
